CONTENT.Honours: Senegal U20WAFU U-20 Tournament: 2019Arab Cup U-20: 2020IndividualWAFU U-20 Tournament Best Goalkeeper: 2019
CONTENT.Club career: Having begun his career at Guédiawaye in his native Senegal, Fall joined French club Saint-Étienne on a professional deal on 5 January 2021, following the termination of Stéphane Ruffier's contract at the club. Seven months later on 5 August, Fall extended his contract with Saint-Étienne until June 2025. On 30 December 2022, he made his professional debut for the club in a 1–1 Ligue 2 draw against Caen. In March 2023, Fall suffered a meniscus injury for which he had to undergo surgery; Saint-Étienne announced that he would be expected to spend six months on the sidelines.
CONTENT.International career: With the Senegal U20s, Fall was designated as the best goalkeeper in the 2019 WAFU U-20 Tournament, a competition won by Senegal. He went on to win the 2020 Arab Cup U-20 with the same team.

SUMMARY: Boubacar Fall (born 3 February 2001) is a Senegalese professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for  Ligue 1 club Saint-Étienne.
